text: The gorgeous Phi Phi Islands have some of the best beaches and nature in all of Thailand.
It doesn't matter if you just want to relax or if you want to get active.
These are our favorite Phi Phi Island experiences.
Hire a long tail and make your way to Bamboo Island.
The island is the most beautiful of all the Phi Phi Islands and is a great spot to relax on the sand and in the crystal clear water.
Grab a kayak from Phi Phi Don and paddle to Monkey Beach.
The beach is renowned for its beautiful sand and shallow corals and for the many monkeys that visit it.
Have a rewarding swim when you arrive and see if you can spot one of the natives.
Maya Bay became world famous after being featured in the Leonardo DiCaprio movie, The Beach.
The bay is overrun by tour boats, but that doesn't take away from how beautiful it is.
Explore the gorgeous white sand and one of the best coral reefs around the island.
The bay is incredibly busy in the morning, so come later in the afternoon to evade the many tour boats.
If you're feeling active, hike up to the Phi Phi view point for the best view of Koh Phi Phi Don.
Be sure to pack a lot of water because the hike isn't that easy on a hot day.
This massive beach on Phi Phi's main island turns into a party at night, but during the day, it's one of the biggest and best beaches of the islands.
Soak up the sun and take a refreshing dip before you head into town for dinner.
